description: LLM judge classifies each cluster as reuse / compose / novel and drafts a SKILL.md body
rules: read-only with respect to local files — sends only redacted cluster summaries + candidate skill names to the LLM
backend selected by config.yaml: local LM Studio (default, no egress) or opt-in claude/foundry
valid verdicts are exactly reuse / compose / novel; reuse names a target skill, compose/novel emit a SKILL.md body
degrades gracefully — if no LLM backend is reachable each cluster is marked status skipped
verdicts written to record_store as verdicts.json
usage: Set MATCHES (matches.json) and CONFIG (config.yaml selecting the backend). Output: verdicts.json.
limitation: A meaningful verdict needs a reachable LLM backend (local LM Studio on :1234, or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/FOUNDRY_API_KEY for the opt-in cloud backends). Offline it only records skipped clusters.
